title: Radiated: A Crappy HBM_NTM Rewrite
description: A mod about technology, atomic science and nuclear weapons
body:
### Radiated is a unofficial port of HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod

Check out the original mod [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hbms-nuclear-tech-mod)

I'm not affiliated with HBM, and you should not go to the original developer for problems, instead use my [Discord](https://discord.gg/T7EpJv8f3K)

This mod is currenty in **Alpha** and **not** properly **ready** for playing.
> You can still play it, and in fact the mod is updated in a way it'll work in survival. But it'll be missing most of the core features at the moment

#
### In this mod you'll find:
- A wide range of ores and new gimmicks attached to said ores to keep in mind when mining (gimmicks upcoming)
- New ways to generate electricity like steam power, oil power, nuclear power (upcoming)
- New machines to process and utilize the features mentioned before (upcoming)

#
### Dependencies:
[NeoForge 1.21.1](https://projects.neoforged.net/neoforged/neoforge): I have no plans to backport or port to forge or fabric at the moment, so don't ask
